rationale: The activity involves UAC bypass via sdclt.exe (A0, EV-003) to execute a PowerShell command (EV-004) that was previously written to the registry (EV-001, EV-002). The PowerShell command attempts to extract and execute code from an image file, which is a known technique for obfuscated payload delivery. The registry key is subsequently deleted (EV-005), indicating an attempt to clean up traces.
